notes: The live capture completes a disposable draft (harry-test-heelo), verifies an empty `userErrors` response, and records immediate downstream `draftOrder(id:)` visibility with the linked regular order. The selected mutation/downstream draft-order targets include DraftOrder line-item subtotal/tax rollups and the completed Order subtotal/total/tax/received money bags. The proxy resolves the precondition draft via a real cold OrdersDraftOrderHydrate forward (the fixture's single upstreamCall) rather than a setup-block seed, then replays completion locally. Expected differences are limited to Shopify-generated completion/order identity values.

expectedDifferences.reason: Live Shopify and the local draft proxy complete the draft at independent execution times.
Live Shopify and the local draft proxy necessarily allocate different order ids when completing the draft.
Live Shopify and the local draft proxy allocate independent merchant-facing order names.
Live Shopify and the local draft proxy necessarily allocate different line item ids on the completed order.
